unack there uh so the first thing I'll
say is you know you know as a
Institutional Investor I'm never going
to sit there and Advocate anybody have
100% of their portfolio in any position
that's just not smart generally speaking
however if you're going to do that and
you're certainly welcome to uh as an
investor particularly if you're young a
person who's investing money that they
they can afford to lose or they have a
long enough time Horizon where they
suffer a big draw down uh they can you
know they can recover that big draw
different if you're older but you know
for those types of investors then I I
think you you if you're going to be
doing something like 100% long Bitcoin
or you know quotequote irresponsibly
long crypto then you're definitely going
to want to use our discretionary risk
management overlay AKA Dr Mo to stay on
the right side of markas again I don't
think it's a great idea to have your
whole entire portfolio in one position
but if you're going to do that
definitely use uh the The Proven
quantitative tools that we provide to
our clients to stay to to to to to to
compound those returns over time because
I think what you know one of the things
that we found with our volatility just
lium signal and our marker you now can
to process is that you have somewhere
between a
98% to 109% upside capture ratio if
you're just long Bitcoin when our Vamp
signal was bullish and we are in a risk
on Market regime if you're not L Bitcoin
when our Vamp signals is neutral or
bearish or if you're not in a risk-off
market regime uh then you you will
compound returns at a at a much better
level and much higher rate than
investors who are just sort of naked
long Bitcoin like you know I say this
all the time you know if the asset goes
up by 100% you can make 100% if you're
just long the asset but if you trade the
asset appropriately you can make more
than 100% And if you trade the asset
inappropriately you will make less than
100% and that's what our volatility just
a momentum signal uh and discretion
management overlay aka. MO is give
clients the best opportunity to trade
those assets appropriately so that they
are not only getting the return from the
market they're actually outperforming
the market return by avoiding draw downs
and getting back in after draw Downs
which is which is what you want to do
that's how you know the system works um
getting back to the uh some of the uh
questions any thoughts on bitcoin as an
asset in the context of a fourth Turney
regime you know we are structurally
bullish on risk assets structurally
bearish on defensive assets on a
relative basis we do believe that we are
in a four Turner regime and in a four
Turner regime historically speaking
you've seen monetary debasement and uh
Financial repression in order to sort of
help uh uh deal with the explosive
growth in federal debt so right now we
have a Federal Reserve that's about to
cut interest rates with inflation still
well above Target on a year foryear
basis and so that's in my opinion I
think that tells you everything you need
to know about how asymmetrically dobish
fed's reaction function is and how if
you just only knew that one particular
you know thing if that's the only thing
you knew about Mac
then you would obviously uh naturally
beong things like uh crypto and other
risk assets from a longer term
perspective because you ultimately
understand that the path that assets are
going to take to deal with financial
repression and and monetary debasement
is usually one that revolves a lot of
price appreciation so just be aware of
that but again it's not that it's going
to cause price appreciation every single
day week month or year or quarter it's
just you want to be there you want to be
long when the price appreciation is
happening and you don't want to be long
when it's not happening um some folks
might want to be 100% long Bitcoin at
all times and that's fine because they
don't have our volatile adjusted
momentum signal or Doo to actually do
better than just being 100% long Bitcoin
and that obviously is you know trading
it appropriately and again it's not like
you you know bitcoin's changing its
signal all the time or the market reging
nowcasting process is changing its
signal all the time but when those
signals do change I.E going from you
know newal or bearish to bullish that's
when you want to be getting uh grossed
up and long and when those things go
from bullish to neutral to bearish
that's when you want to be taking down
risk or you go from a risk-on market
regime or riskof Market regime and
that's how you compound returns over
time with larger sums of money you can
have the same return percentage wise but
you may not wind up with the same amount
of money if you're not compounding it
properly and so I don't think most
investors that kind of math is a little
bit too hard to do in terms of
